item.title: Glitter Tattoos
item.description: Tattoo artist Amanda Graves from Bel Air, Maryland inks tattoos that sparkle. Inspired by the aesthetic of cheerleading, she uses minuscule needle gauges and pointillism to create the effect of glittering skin – even though it’s just an illusion.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: Some having to walk through miles of undeveloped land to their friends’ houses. Those plots of land now developed into houses so close they can high five each other from their toliets
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: "Unions are great, so long as they don't ask for stuff or stand up to corporations"
item.description: "But but but..... a recession hurts all workers" Well Damn Jackie, sounds like to avoid a recession congress should have forced the billion dollar corporations to give employees a few sick days, rather than destroy a workers movement and force the railway employees to work without a single sick day, right in the middle of a global fucking pandemic. Absolutely insane how this is being portrayed as "workers vs the economy", rather than "workers vs greedy rail corporations who made more than 27 billion dollars last year" (originally posted by @AoShin on 2022-12-02 23:56:34)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Made a friend
item.description: Several years ago I went on a hike in northern Utah and spotted this little guy and followed him back to his den. I set up my camera, laid down and waited for him to poke his head out. Took about half an hour but when he finally appeared I was so excited (as you can probably tell by my eyes I was internally screaming trying not to move or make a sound) and it’s still one of the coolest experiences I’ve ever had.
item.dc:creator: AbortionMilkshake

item.dc:creator: SubtleOrc

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1041 (Orangutan Opening)
item.description:
Howdy, y'all. Let's get this bread.
Yeah, this tracks.
Big mood.
Ever see those maps of New World archaeological cultures? Yeah, someone did that for Europe, and this is HILARIOUS to me. @feryooday will also probably get this right off the bat.
I still haven't found a new name I like for this bird, so Big Blue Darter it is, I guess.
Oddly, not the Pippin. He prefers Safflower as a treat. Or pizza.
Why not both?
It's the only way I can afford to travel these days
It was a rockin' song though.
Hell yeah, let me become the fæ's problem.
Mood
Just some romans.
Elder Scrolls alignment chart
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What? What? Up. Thank you. Glory Pippin."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: My rights don't end where your feelings begin
item.description: FP Edit - Support your local library. They need us, we need them. FP Edit 2 - Wow - 2300?? Ooh, I didn't have a speech prepared. I do have stories that might offend you - check these out: Necktie Party - Just as their small Southern town began to experience a re-birth on a new way of industry related to neurocybernetic technology, a terrorist attack destroys their city and someone is going to pay. Now, two old farts must talk a mob of angry, frightened people out of murder at a broken down motel in post-collapse America. https://books2read.com/u/bzdY92 The Rocket - For anyone who lost their family to conspiracy theories or Alex Jones. In the last few hours before life on earth ends, a young dad has a chance meeting with his estranged father. Will this be a moment of reconciliation, or recrimination? How can you communicate with someone who refuses to listen? Mike Crane takes one last shot to save his father's life before he boards THE ROCKET. https://books2read.com/u/4NaqxW (originally posted by @inkican on 2022-12-02 15:33:15)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: My good boy
item.description: He died in my arms yesterday and I am not okay. I will be. But I am not okay right now.

item.title: what are the odds?
item.description: Wife and I are checking our Secret Santas for this year and something just looks a little too familiar. Im commenting on how this woman sounds a lot like my wife and then I read the username and it's her. Guess SS this year is gonna be easy.

item.title: It’s the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends. i'm back after a lengthy 3 day hiatus
to be fair, I’ve seen many English breakfasts that look absolutely incredible
this is by far Stevie's favorite image in this dump
I always knew Finland was cool
as is tradition
this old but those don’t really apply to me?
damnit, James. I trusted you
precarious
everyone loves snacks
mmm hmm
other burger places hate them
*birb
I feel like that’s the main way people hear about it
I’m a big GD fan so I love this
legend
comma isn’t necessary?
been a minute since I played GTA. New trailer next week?
since he was mentioned earlier... Stevie looking goofy tax
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7
